response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified performers as the VTuber group 'FLOW GLOW' from logo and on-screen text. 2. Identified the song as 'MAKE IT, BREAK IT' from search results and music video details. 3. Confirmed the original artists are FLOW GLOW. 4. Searched for and retrieved the full Japanese lyrics for 'MAKE IT, BREAK IT' from a music database. 5. No complete English translation was found, so 'reference_lyrics_en' is null. 6. Segmented the video into a single scene representing the entire song performance.
response.global_summary: A live 3D performance by the VTuber group FLOW GLOW, singing their song 'MAKE IT, BREAK IT'.

scenes.description: The VTuber group FLOW GLOW performs their song 'MAKE IT, BREAK IT' live with 3D visuals and dynamic choreography.
